spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (WebGPU: 3D texture support for BC and ASTC compressed formats) and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive controls drive the page (2 buttons, 0 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges, 2 listeners) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces multiple failure / unsupported / edge-case branches in the UI, not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Page cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/5080855386783744 self-heal link (CLAUDE.md rule 3).

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: 'Texture Compression Benchmark' is a solid concept page: interactive surface lands, references are in place, and the design system rules hold. The follow-ups in openQuestions are polish, not blockers.
